pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor scope includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and commissioning of the Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Supply of 2 Water Cooled Chillers, each with 300 TR capacity.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressor type must be Screw Compressor.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge of refrigerant and oil.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Shell & Tube evaporator and condenser tubes must be made of SS 304.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Water Cooled Screw Chiller are Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be of Induced draft type with FRP Basin, Casing, and Louvers.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower fill and eliminator material must be PVC.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Cooling Tower are Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: One Double Skin Air Handling Unit (AHU) with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM is required.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must achieve an outlet air temperature of 22 +/- 2 DegC and relative humidity of 45 +/- 2%.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must have a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters and a plug fan with VFD.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU drain pan and cooling coil (casing, tube, header) must be made of SS 304.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for AHU are Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Supply of 3 Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and 3 Condenser Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby), each suitable for 600 TR load.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals. Casing MOC: Cast Iron, Impeller MOC: SS, Shaft MOC: EN8.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3, TEFC squirrel cage induction type with class F insulation.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Pumps are KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for PLC are Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Transmitters are Yokogawa, E&H, Emmerson, Kemplast (Siemens), WIKA, or Forbes Marshall (Krohne).
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Electrical power supply for the system is 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Ph.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site location is Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) is responsible for providing power supply (415V) and makeup water to the battery limits.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) is responsible for all required permits, site dismantling, and OSBL (Outside Battery Limits) piping and electrical work.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx
